name: Dana Naser
headline: Data Analyst • SQL • Business Intelligence • KPI Reporting
profile: Data-driven Information Systems student focused on SQL, KPI design, and business reporting. I transform structured data into clear insights that support decision-making.

about.p1: I’m a third-year B.Sc. Information Systems student at the University of Haifa, specializing in data analytics and business intelligence.
about.p2: My strength is translating business questions into structured SQL logic, KPIs, and reporting views that create operational clarity and support better decisions.
what_i_bring: BI mindset: KPIs, trends, anomalies, operational visibility

projects.name: Winery Sales & Inventory Analysis
projects.one_liner: Designed KPI-driven reporting to improve inventory visibility and operational decisions.
projects.problem: Limited visibility into product-level sales performance and stock risk.
projects.objective: Improve inventory awareness and enable structured KPI tracking for decision-making.
approach: Designed normalized schema (ERD) to support reliable querying
Built SQL queries for KPI reporting and monitoring
Structured repeatable reporting logic for consistency
recommendations: Rebalance inventory based on demand trends
Implement weekly KPI monitoring (stock risk, rotation, sales)

projects.name: StockSync
projects.one_liner: Inventory tracking concept focused on operational clarity and structured monitoring.
projects.problem: Users lacked clear visibility into inventory status and waste patterns.
projects.objective: Reduce waste and improve inventory awareness through structured visibility.
approach: Designed responsive UI focused on clarity and speed
Structured inventory logic to support KPI-style monitoring
Defined stock alerts and simple dashboard metrics
insights: Clear visibility improves decision speed and reduces waste risk
Simple KPI widgets make monitoring actionable
recommendations: Add expiring-soon alerts and usage-rate indicators
Include category filters and consumption trend view

projects.name: Hospital Operations System
projects.one_liner: Structured operations system emphasizing clean data architecture and maintainable workflows.
projects.problem: Operational workflows require consistent structure to keep records reliable.
projects.objective: Model core entities and workflows to support coordination and maintainability.
approach: Modeled entities and relationships for operations management
Built maintainable OOP structure for core workflows
Focused on structured thinking and data consistency
insights: Clear entity structure improves operational consistency
recommendations: Add reporting views for operational monitoring
Document workflows and entity relationships clearly
